15.reason: Error: In C, function parameters cannot use reference syntax '&'. Use a pointer instead, e.g., 'int *top'.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: In C, function parameters cannot use reference syntax '&'. Use a pointer instead, e.g., 'int *top'.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: In C, function parameters cannot use reference (&). Use pointer instead.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [C语言不支持引用参数，应使用指针或全局变量]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: C does not support pass-by-reference. Use int *top and dereference pointer, or pass top by value and return new top.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  C language does not support reference parameters (int &top); this is C++ syntax. In C, you must use pointers (int *top) to modify the variable passed by address.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  C language does not support reference parameters (int &top); this is C++ syntax. In C, you must use pointers (int *top) to modify the variable passed by address.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  // C does not support reference parameters (int &top); should be (int *top)
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  // C does not support reference parameters; 'int &top' is invalid syntax in C (this is C++ syntax)
